intro: Good morning! Here is your reading for today. Take a few minutes to sit with this passage before the day begins.
outro: May this word take root in your heart today. Blessings, The pastoral team

soapOverride.intro: Good morning! Today's SOAP reading is below. Work through each section at your own pace — Scripture, Observation, Application, and Prayer.
soapOverride.outro: Whatever you wrote in the Application or Prayer sections — carry it with you today. Blessings, The pastoral team
